---
title: "About the Course"

number-depth: 2
---


## About the course


##  Course Overview

* **Course ID:** BSCS2001
* **Course Type:** Programming 
* **Course Credits:** 4 Credits 
* **Pre-requisites:** None! 

---

##  Course Faculty

###  Faculty Lead
**Dr. Partha Pratim Das** *Professor, Department of Computer Science and Engineering* **IIT Kharagpur**

###  Course Instructor
**Manidipa Bhattacharjee** 

---

## Textbook

* **Title:** *Database System Concepts* (7th Edition)
* **Authors:** Avi Silberschatz, Henry F. Korth, S. Sudarshan
* **Publisher:** McGraw-Hill

---

##  How to Use This Portal

The content is organized chronologically. Just expand the navigation menu on the left sidebar to jump into specific topics.
